title: My Resource Pack, My Choice
description: Stop servers from overriding your resource packs! Allows you to skip, block and disable certain server resources and to move or ignore and remove it completely
body:
![Before After Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PTj85Anz/images/2f699deeb9e4b5adc7f9fa61172244122ef3d4be.png) # Description This mod can be used to give you full control over server resource packs. It allows you to ignore, re-order or just partially apply server packs, giving you full control, which parts of the pack you want to use. # Features - Completely ignore a server pack ([See wiki](https://github.com/MrKinau/MyResourcePack/wiki#feature-1-completely-ignore-a-server-pack))
Screenshot
- Re-order server resource packs ([See wiki](https://github.com/MrKinau/MyResourcePack/wiki#feature-2-re-order-server-resource-packs))
Screenshot
- Prevent overriding vanilla resources ([See wiki](https://github.com/MrKinau/MyResourcePack/wiki#feature-3-prevent-overriding-vanilla-resources))
Screenshot
- Manually Choose which resources should be overridden ([See wiki](https://github.com/MrKinau/MyResourcePack/wiki#feature-4-manually-choose-which-resources-should-be-overridden))
Screenshot
# Why? Some servers tend to supply ugly resources, which override vanilla textures. Sometimes simply ignoring the server resource pack is not an option, as the server may add additional items, blocks or inventories, that will then no longer be visible.
